name: Dungeons & Dragons
description: Dungeons & Dragons is the seminal tabletop role-playing game — a Dungeon Master narrates, the players roll polyhedral dice and play characters drawn on hand-written sheets, and together a story unfolds. Gygax and Arneson's 1974 invention spawned an entire industry; the current Fifth Edition has carried the hobby into mainstream pop culture. Pen, paper, dice, and imagination.
